---
title : "Figure 9.2"
subtitle : "Random features - kernels"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie, SpecialFunctions
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
function run_random_features(m, x, y, xtest, n, ntest, d, rng)
    nrep = 10
    yests = zeros(ntest, nrep)
    for irep in 1:nrep
        W = randn(rng, m, d)
        for i in 1:m
            W[i, :] ./= norm(W[i, :])
        end
        b = rand(rng, m) .* 2.0 .- 1.0

        Phi = max.(x * W' .+ b', 0.0)
        Phitest = max.(xtest * W' .+ b', 0.0)

        K = Phi * Phi' / m
        Ktest = Phitest * Phi' / m

        alpha = (K + 1e-12 * I) \ y
        yests[:, irep] = Ktest * alpha
    end
    return yests
end
```

```{julia}
rng = MersenneTwister(0)
d = 1
n = 10
x = rand(rng, n) .* 2.0 .- 1.0
y = randn(rng, n)
xtest = collect(-1:0.001:1)
ntest = length(xtest)

# Spline kernel
D_train = (x .- x').^2
D_test = (xtest .- x').^2

fac = gamma(2) * gamma(d/2) / (gamma(d/2 + 1.5) * gamma(0.5))
K_spline = 1/6 .+ x * x' / (2.0 * d) + D_train.^1.5 / 24.0 * fac
Ktest_spline = 1/6 .+ xtest * x' / (2.0 * d) + D_test.^1.5 / 24.0 * fac

alpha = K_spline \ y
yest_spline = Ktest_spline * alpha

yests_20 = run_random_features(20, x, y, xtest, n, ntest, d, rng)
yests_100 = run_random_features(100, x, y, xtest, n, ntest, d, rng)
yests_200 = run_random_features(200, x, y, xtest, n, ntest, d, rng)
```

```{julia}
fig = Figure(size=(1500, 500), fontsize=18)

ms = [20, 100, 200]
yests_all = [yests_20, yests_100, yests_200]

for (i, m) in enumerate(ms)
    ax = Axis(fig[1, i], xlabel="x", ylabel="y", title="m = $m", limits=((-1, 1), (-10, 10)))

    # Plot random features replicas
    for r in 1:10
        lines!(ax, xtest, yests_all[i][:, r], color=orange, linewidth=1)
    end

    # Plot spline kernel
    lines!(ax, xtest, yest_spline, color=blue, linewidth=3, label="spline kernel")

    # Plot data points
    scatter!(ax, x, y, color=green, markersize=16, label="data")

    axislegend(ax, position=:rt)
end

fig
```
